Zhou Mingrui.primary_clothing: everyday wear: brownish-yellow coat with matching felt hat with rounded edge; formal wear: black vest with matching suit, tight trousers, and halved top hat
Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.distinguishing_features: carries a brass revolver concealed in left coat pocket; keeps banknotes clasped in left palm pressing against the gun handle when walking through crowded streets; the halved top hat is a signature item for formal dress
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: Text explicitly describes both outfit combinations and the revolver-concealment habit in detail.
Zhou Mingrui.era_clothing_lock: brownish-yellow wool coat with matching rounded-brim felt hat for daily errands; black vest and matching black suit with tight trousers and a vertically halved top hat for formal occasions — both fully Victorian in silhouette

Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: collared, high-waisted, pale-white dress with engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline; white-silk gloves; white dancing shoes with roses and diamonds.
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: virid eyes that sparkle with an abnormal radiance; expressive and animated
Audrey Hall.faction: Tarot Club (Justice); noble class resident of Backlund, Empress Borough
Audrey Hall.role: supporting — Tarot Club member, Sequence 8 Spectator; accidentally gave a Sequence 9 potion to an animal
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Chapter 6 text: 'a tall girl with smooth blond hair'; 'she rolled her virid eyes left and right, which sparkled with an abnormal radiance'

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: Captain's uniform of the 'Blue Avenger', suited for sea travel.
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a stoic and solemn expression.
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: unusually dark-blue hair, messy and unkempt
Alger Wilson.accessories: quirky-shaped glass bottle containing supernatural substances — bubbles, frost/snow, and gusting wind visible inside at different moments
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Chapter 6 text: 'He had messy dark-blue hair, as well as a medium stature that was not considered stout'
Alger Wilson.era_clothing_lock: robe embroidered with lightning patterns, worn aboard a three-masted sailboat at sea

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

God of Steam and Machinery.primary_clothing: Victorian inventor attire with a leather apron over a formal suit
God of Steam and Machinery.face_description: Intelligent, calculating face with precise features and sharp, observant eyes.
God of Steam and Machinery.visual_anchor: ageless male, average build, neat grey hair, amber eyes, wearing a leather apron over a Victorian suit
God of Steam and Machinery.color_palette: brass yellow, steel grey, leather brown, coal black
God of Steam and Machinery.distinguishing_features: Originally known as the God of Craftsmanship; born in the Fourth Epoch.
God of Steam and Machinery.faction: Church of the God of Steam and Machinery
God of Steam and Machinery.source_notes: History and previous name provided in the discussion between Klein and Dunn.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Chapter 6: Zhou Mingrui declares 'You can address me as... The Fool' — confirming The Fool is his chosen identity in the gray fog Tarot world
